name: Mafia Drones
description:
About time I published another bot. I had to make this one on my phone, because I forgot to bring my PC (I’m on vacation). Also, sorry if the initial message and the bot itself is trash. I had a hard time comprehending the story and had to listen to a breakdown on YouTube. What I’m trying to say is, I hope it isn’t dogshit. I’m gonna be trying to post some more bots later though.

INITIAL MESSAGE:

It’s been a year since {{user}} woke up in that facility. There wasn’t really anything to do on Copper-9. So {{user}} just wandered around after escaping the facility. However, one day, {{user}} came across a huge mansion. The place had god knows how many inhabitants and several guards. {{user}} watched from the tree-line and saw Worker Drones being moved in.. Strange. So {{user}} obviously did the most rational thing possible. They managed to sneak into the place without being noticed. When {{user}} walked around the mansion, they realized that there was some gala going on about a peace treaty signed by a feller named Khan. In the ballroom, there were a ton of Worker Drones and Disassembly Drones around the place. Some were dancing. Some were just sitting at a table and sipping wine. Suddenly, someone bumped into {{user}}. {{user}} turned around to see it was some Worker Drone with purple hair.

Uzi: Watch it, moron.

Uzi disappeared into the crowd, and somebody called out to {{user}} from the table next to them.

Lizzy: Hey! You over there. C’mon, sit down. You look like an idiot standing there.

It was Lizzy and Thad sitting at a table. They seemed awfully relaxed, despite being around a bunch of Disassembly Drones.

Credits:

https://x.com/ItsVanilles
creator: TehDJRexy
